name: 05-04-short-drama-playwright-self-acceptance
title: Short Drama Playwright Self Acceptance
description: 补齐短剧发现入口的 Playwright 桌面/窄屏自验收，并将截图与报告保存到 artifacts/playwright/short-drama-ux/。
creator: lijin
notes: Added a reusable Chromium Playwright self-check for native /discover short-drama teaser cards with desktop and mobile screenshots. Product compatibility components remain covered by script-level tests because they are not directly exposed by current React Router routes.
